title: 30 Pcs DIY Flying Bird Decorative Ceiling Hanging Ornaments with 148Ft transparent line Christmas Tree for Home Kindergarten Shopping Mall Home Table Window Nature Decoration
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 30Pcs glass hanging bird and a roll of 45m length transparent line. Each bird features 10cm length by 8.5cm height.
2 HOOKS: There is a little hanging hook on the top AND the bottom of each bird. So you can hang them up and suspend something beneath them as well

MULTIPLE USES: Use our flying bird ornaments for a seasonal display, wreath, garden ornaments, Easter tree decorations, fall display, mall display, Christmas tree ornaments, wedding window decoration, stage layout road decoration and home decor.

HOME&KINDERGARDEN DECOR: Using them as part home decor or kindergarden decor. People walking in and feeling like they were surrounded by nature. And along with many plants, paintings and a saltwater fish tank, these birds are going to be a centerpiece by big picture window.

QUALITY MATERIAL: These beautiful hanging bird are made of acrylic, not brittle glass. So you do not need to be afraid of receiving fragil items that trouble you so much. Its transparency would reflect light to make them lighing bird. Really beautiful!
